title: calamagrostis neglecta f. exserta
intro: Calamagrostis neglecta f. exserta, also known as a variant of the fescue grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Calamagrostis neglecta f. exserta include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing coughs, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their therapeutic effects.
